About Us
Hyderabad Cafe is a cafe/restaurant, serving global cuisine with delicacies from around the world, where you can find something delicious for everyone. We love to experiment with our food and menu, by coming up with seasonal dishes, and brainstorming beautiful amalgamations of sweet & savory.
